name: Tex-Mex Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: Dry roasted, unsalted cashews, chopped (1/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the tuna, cottage cheese, sour cream, red onion, green chiles, salsa, and noodles.
3. Turn the mixture into a 2-quart casserole dish coated with non-stick spray.
4. Combine the saltine crackers and cashews and sprinkle over the top.
5. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes.
NOTE: The amount of vegetables in this recipe works out to one tablespoon per person, so you don't need to use a veggie card for such a small amount. If you want to increase it to 1 veggie card, serve with 1/3 cup of steamed vegetables per person.
Deal-A-Meal Cards Used: 1 Bread, 1 Meat, 1 Fat, 1 Dairy
Calories: 256
